upgrade_source: Wikipedia (Myrtle-Wyckoff Avenues station); MTA capital program records
notes: Same physical complex as ID 112. M train (Myrtle Avenue Line) platform. Three elevators put into service fall 2007, connecting L platform, lower mezzanine, street/upper mezzanine, and M platform. Station complex renovated 2004-2008. Main station building opened April 19, 2007.
